g.title: acq.invoice_entry:invoice->acq.invoice:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (invoice) REFERENCES acq.invoice(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: acq.invoice_entry:purchase_order->acq.purchase_order:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (purchase_order) REFERENCES acq.purchase_order(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL

g.title: acq.invoice_entry:lineitem->acq.lineitem:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (lineitem) REFERENCES acq.lineitem(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL

g.title: acq.fund_debit:invoice_entry->acq.invoice_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (invoice_entry) REFERENCES acq.invoice_entry(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
